summary: Testing iteration 33: Code generation (AC/S/IN formats) and OCR feature. Backend APIs all working correctly (100%). Frontend OCR button visible. Session/Inventory code display in dialogs NOT working - state update issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Session code (S001/26) not displaying in 'Open Session' dialog despite API returning correct data
Inventory code (IN0001/26) not displaying in 'Start Inventory' dialog despite API working

integration_issues.issue: API /api/daily-sessions/generate-code returns S001/26 but React state doesn't update the UI
API /api/inventory-sessions/generate-code works but code not displayed in dialog

action_items: FIX: Session code not rendering in DailySessionsPage dialog - check React state update timing
FIX: Inventory code not rendering in InventoryCountPage dialog - same issue
Note: Both APIs work correctly - curl returns S001/26 and IN0001/26 - issue is frontend state management
critical_code_review_comments: DailySessionsPage.js line 743-748: The onOpenChange callback sets sessionCode via API but the component may not re-render correctly
InventoryCountPage.js line 1021-1031: Same issue - async state update in onOpenChange may not trigger re-render
Possible fix: Move the API call to a useEffect that triggers when showStartDialog becomes true
React duplicate key warning in sidebar menu - 'الإدارة' key is duplicated multiple times
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend code generation APIs all working (AC/S/IN formats). OCR button in Edit Product page works. Main issues are: (1) Session code not displaying in dialog title despite API working, (2) Inventory code not displaying in dialog. The issue appears to be React state update timing - the async API call in onOpenChange may not trigger re-render.

ocr_button_edit_page.notes: OCR upload button visible with data-testid='ocr-upload-btn', Compatible Models input visible

rca_of_the_issue: The session and inventory codes are not displaying in dialogs due to React state timing issue. The API calls in onOpenChange are asynchronous - when the dialog opens, onOpenChange fires and makes API call, but the Dialog component renders before the API returns. When setSessionCode/setInventoryCode is called, the component should re-render but the dialog title may not be picking up the updated state. Possible fix: Use useEffect to fetch code when dialog state changes, or ensure the API call completes before showing the dialog.
